title: The Dowry Prohibition Act, 1961
full_text: The Dowry Prohibition Act, 1961 दहेज प्रतिषेध अधिनियम, 1961 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196128 Act Number: 28 Enactment Date: 1961-05-20 Act Year: 1961 Short Title: The Dowry Prohibition Act, 1961 Hindi Title: दहेज प्रतिषेध अधिनियम, 1961 Long Title: An Act to prohibit the giving or taking of dowry. Ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development Enforcement Date: 01-07-1961 Notification: 1st July, 1961, vide notification No. S.O. 1410, dated 20th June, 1961, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Dowry Prohibition Act, 1961 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definition of “dowry”. Section 3. Penalty for giving or taking dowry. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Penalty for demanding dowry. Section 4A. Ban on advertisement. Section 5. Agreement for giving or taking dowry to be void. Section 6. Dowry to be for the benefit of the wife or her heirs. Section 7. Cognizance of offences. Section 8. Offences to be cognizable for certain purposes and to be bailable and non-compoundable. Section 8A. Burden of proof in certain cases Section 8B. Dowry Prohibition Officers Section 9. Power to make rules Show Related Subordinates Section 10.
